transcript:
Speaker A: What is your native language?
Speaker B: My native language is Hindi.
Speaker A: Wow, your English sounds really good.
Speaker B: A few months ago, I didn't speak English at all, and I couldn't get a job.
Speaker A: Seriously? How did you learn so fast?
Speaker B: I have an AI tutor that helps me.
Speaker A: Wow, that's amazing. Show me.
Speaker C: हे नेहा, कैसी हो आज? [Hey Neha, how are you today?]
Speaker B: I was being interviewed right now...
Speaker C: "I was" नहीं, "I am being interviewed right now" बोलना चाहिए। [Not "I was", you should say "I am being interviewed right now".]
Speaker B: Oh, I am being interviewed right now.
Speaker C: बिल्कुल सही। इंटरव्यू किस बारे में है? [Exactly. What is the interview about?]
Speaker B: It's about my English skills. They say me I speak with confidence.
Speaker C: "They say me" नहीं, "They say I speak with confidence" होगा। [Not "They say me", it will be "They say I speak with confidence".]
Speaker B: You're right. They say I speak with confidence.
Speaker C: मेरे साथ हम रोज़ इंग्लिश इम्प्रूव कर सकते हैं। रोज़ 10 मिनट मेरे साथ इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करो और आप एक महीने में अच्छी इंग्लिश बोलने लगोगे। [With me, we can improve English daily. Practice English with me for 10 minutes daily and you will start speaking good English in a month.] 50 लाख से ज़्यादा यूज़र्स MySivi में प्रैक्टिस करते हैं। आप भी कर लो। सिर्फ ₹1 में MySivi शुरू करो। [More than 50 lakh users practice on MySivi. You should too. Start MySivi for just ₹1.]
Speaker D: Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: WHAT IS YOUR NATIVE LANGUAGE; MY NATIVE LANGUAGE IS HINDI; YOUR ENGLISH SOUNDS REALLY GOOD; A FEW MONTHS AGO; I DIDN'T SPEAK ENGLISH AT ALL; AND I COULDN'T GET A JOB; HOW DID YOU LEARN SO FAST; I HAVE AN AI TUTOR; THAT HELPS ME; THAT'S AMAZING; SHOW ME; I WAS BEING INTERVIEWED; I AM BEING INTERVIEWED; RIGHT NOW; THEY SAY ME; THEY SAY I SPEAK; WITH CONFIDENCE; MERE SAATH [With me]; ROZ ENGLISH [Daily English]; ROZ 10 MINUTE [Daily 10 minutes]; MERE SAATH ENGLISH [English with me]; EK MAHINE MEIN [In one month]; ACHHI ENGLISH [Good English]; BOLNE LAGOGE [Will start speaking]; MySivi AI English Speaking... MySivi AI; Install; 5M+ Downloads; MySivi; Improve English speaking with AI; only at ₹1 Install Now; SIRF ₹1 MEIN MYSIVI [MySivi in just ₹1]; MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A woman explains in a street interview how she quickly improved her English to get a job using an AI tutor. She demonstrates the MySivi app, showing how the AI avatar corrects her grammar in real-time. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app for a promotional price of ₹1.
